zh.Valmont, Estouteville-en-Caux, Calvados,: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特
zh.Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯度德奧維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Doudeauville於大約1383年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯度德奧維爾時，她的父親Jean du Bois de Fiennes35歲，母親Jeanne de Créquy16歲。她於1401年與Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval在法國結婚。她去世於1449年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Doudeauville于大约1383年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯度德奧維爾时，她的父亲Jean du Bois de Fiennes35岁，母亲Jeanne de Créquy16岁。她于1401年与Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval在法国结婚。她去世于1449年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Doudeauville was born about 1383, in Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Jean du Bois de Fiennes, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne de Créquy, was 16. She married Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval in 1401, in France. She died before 1449.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Doudeauville est née environ 1383, à Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Jean du Bois de Fiennes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Créquy, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval en 1401, à France. Elle est décédée avant 1449.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Doudeauville um 1383 in Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean du Bois de Fiennes 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Créquy 16. Sie hat 1401 in Frankreich Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval geheiratet. Sie starb vor 1449.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Doudeauville è nata il circa 1383 nel Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Jean du Bois de Fiennes, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Créquy, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval nel 1401, nel Francia. Morì prima del 1449.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Doudeauvilleが約1383年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスドウディーウヴィルで生まれた時，父Jean du Bois de Fiennesは35歳，母Jeanne de Créquyは16歳であった。1401年にフランスでRaoul Seigneur de Reynevalと結婚した。彼女は1449年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Doudeauville(이)가 대략 1383년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 다도빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean du Bois de Fiennes(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Créquy(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1401년 프랑스에서 Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1449년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Doudeauville nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Doudeauville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Jean du Bois de Fiennes, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Créquy, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval em 1401, em França. Ela faleceu antes 1449.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Doudeauville родилась около 1383 г. в местности доудовилл, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean du Bois de Fiennes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Créquy, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul Seigneur de Reyneval в 1401 г. в местности Франция. Она умерла перед 1449 г.
